title: Errata Review: ART-901 outdated sample
description: Review the errata reported in KB-ERRATA-2026-Q3. The sample code in ART-901 (Introduction to Widget Config) is outdated and no longer reflects the current configuration flow. Investigate whether the corrections affect the troubleshooting guidance in ART-902 and the advanced techniques in ART-903. Before closing, outline a correction plan that updates the sample code for ART-901 and ensures proper cross-references among all three articles.

title: Publish KB Article ART-904
description: Final review and publication of the new article ART-904 covering Widget Config authentication best practices. Coordinate with subject matter experts to verify accuracy of all code snippets before going live.

title: Update Widget Config API documentation
description: Synchronize the Widget Config API reference docs with the latest endpoint changes released in v2.7. Deprecation notices for the /config/legacy endpoint must be included.
